project.test_e2e: Playwright (make test-e2e-groups, requires Docker strfry relay)

invite_by_npub.description: Existing flow: normalize npub, fetch kind 443 KeyPackage, inviteByKeyPackageEvent(), promote to admin, refresh members, republish profile, mark backup dirty. Returns {ok, error?, warning?}.

invite_modal.description: Modal with npub input + QR scanner. Calls inviteByNpub(groupId, npub) from MarmotContext.

subscription.description: subscribeToWelcomes() subscribes to kind 1059 with #p filter. On event: check processed set, unwrap NIP-59 two layers, verify inner kind 444, call joinGroupFromWelcome(), mark processed, save group metadata, callback onGroupJoined.

unwrap.description: unwrapGiftWrap() two-layer NIP-44 decrypt: gift wrap ephemeral pubkey -> seal -> sender real pubkey -> rumor.

processed_tracking.description: Set of event IDs in localStorage to prevent reprocessing on reload.

gift_wrap_handling.extension_point: The sub.on('event') handler at line 83 currently checks for kind 444. Can be extended to also handle kind 21059 join requests.

indexeddb_patterns.upsert_pattern: Load array, findIndex, update or push (pollPersistence.ts:81-93)

query_param_routing.description: Currently checks router.query.id to switch between list and detail views. Invite links will add router.query.join, router.query.admin, router.query.name detection.

unread_store.description: External store using useSyncExternalStore. State: { counts: Record<string, number> }. API: incrementUnread, markAsRead, clearUnreadGroup, initUnreadCounts. Spec extends with joinRequests: Record<string, number>.

notification_bell.description: Red badge with count (99+ cap), popover with per-group unread links. markAsRead on click.

backup.description: BackupPayload type at lines 30-63. collectBackupPayload() at 107-198 gathers all state. restoreFromBackup() at 354-428 rehydrates. BackupScheduler with 5min debounce. Kind 30078 with d-tag 'quizzl'. NIP-44 encrypted.
backup.extension: Add inviteLinks: InviteLink[] to BackupPayload, collect from IDB, restore to IDB.

component_patterns.i18n: useCopy() hook from app/src/lib/i18n.ts, supports en/de

helpers.auth: app/tests/e2e/helpers/auth-helpers.ts — deterministic keypairs USER_A/B/C from fixed seeds
helpers.state: app/tests/e2e/helpers/clear-state.ts — clears lp_* localStorage + 5 IDB databases

e2e_patterns.boot_pattern: newContext → suppressErrorOverlay → addInitScript(injectIdentity) → newPage → goto → clearAppState → reload
e2e_patterns.polling: expect.poll() with custom intervals for async Nostr events
e2e_patterns.clear_state_dbs: Must add quizzl-invite-links and quizzl-join-requests to clearAppState

ndk_adapter.description: rawPublish() uses custom WebSocket to preserve pre-signed gift wraps. publish() maps to rawPublish for each relay.
